role_summary: Configuration template that defines runtime parameters for an AI-assisted source code analysis and documentation system, governing model integration, input filtering thresholds, multi-stage analysis depth, and quality-versus-throughput trade-offs.
finding: The system implements explicit upper and lower bounds on file size and content length to prevent wasting computational resources on irrelevant or trivial inputs. It features a tunable reasoning depth parameter that directly governs the trade-off between processing time and analytical quality, alongside a staged introspection workflow. Default settings are deliberately optimized to prioritize thorough, high-fidelity output over rapid execution speed.
